caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey and black baseball cap with a circular logo, and over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone. He is positioned in a studio with dark, vertically ribbed acoustic foam panels covering the background. The microphone is held by a boom arm and features a pop filter and a windscreen. The brand name "Blue" is visible on the boom arm, and the text "Broadcast Master" is printed on the microphone's mount. As the scene progresses, the man maintains a consistent position while speaking, his facial expressions shifting slightly. He appears to be mid-conversation, with his mouth open and his gaze directed slightly downward and to the side. His left arm, featuring a tattoo on the upper arm, is partially visible as he leans toward the microphone.
